obligations.rule: Valid currency strings must match the default options profile.
obligations.why: The README specifies the default behavior when no options are provided.

obligations.rule: Currency strings must respect the `symbol` option.
obligations.why: The `symbol` option allows customization of the currency symbol.

obligations.rule: Currency strings must respect the `require_symbol` option.
obligations.why: The `require_symbol` option enforces the presence of a currency symbol.

obligations.rule: Currency strings must respect the `allow_space_after_symbol` option.
obligations.why: The `allow_space_after_symbol` option permits a space between the symbol and the numeric value.

obligations.rule: Currency strings must respect the `symbol_after_digits` option.
obligations.why: The `symbol_after_digits` option allows the currency symbol to appear after the numeric value.

obligations.rule: Currency strings must respect the `allow_negatives` option.
obligations.why: The `allow_negatives` option determines whether negative values are valid.

obligations.rule: Currency strings must respect the `parens_for_negatives` option.
obligations.why: The `parens_for_negatives` option allows negative values to be enclosed in parentheses.

obligations.rule: Currency strings must respect the `negative_sign_before_digits` option.
obligations.why: The `negative_sign_before_digits` option allows the negative sign to appear before the numeric value.

obligations.rule: Currency strings must respect the `negative_sign_after_digits` option.
obligations.why: The `negative_sign_after_digits` option allows the negative sign to appear after the numeric value.

obligations.rule: Currency strings must respect the `allow_negative_sign_placeholder` option.
obligations.why: The `allow_negative_sign_placeholder` option permits a space where the negative sign would appear.

obligations.rule: Currency strings must respect the `thousands_separator` option.
obligations.why: The `thousands_separator` option specifies the separator for thousands.

obligations.rule: Currency strings must respect the `decimal_separator` option.
obligations.why: The `decimal_separator` option specifies the separator for decimals.

obligations.rule: Currency strings must respect the `allow_decimal` option.
obligations.why: The `allow_decimal` option determines whether decimal values are allowed.

obligations.rule: Currency strings must respect the `require_decimal` option.
obligations.why: The `require_decimal` option enforces the presence of a decimal value.

obligations.rule: Currency strings must respect the `digits_after_decimal` option.
obligations.why: The `digits_after_decimal` option specifies the exact number of digits allowed after the decimal separator.

obligations.rule: Currency strings must respect the `allow_space_after_digits` option.
obligations.why: The `allow_space_after_digits` option permits a space after the numeric value.

obligations.rule: Ensure early return when `str` is not a string.
obligations.why: The `assertString` helper enforces type validation.

obligations.rule: Ensure the `merge` helper correctly combines options.
obligations.why: The `merge` function integrates user-provided options with defaults.

obligations.rule: Ensure regex construction handles all branches in `currencyRegex`.
obligations.why: The `currencyRegex` function builds the regex based on options.

obligations.rule: Cover the uncovered statement at line 6: decimal_digits = `${decimal_digits}|\\d{${digit}}`;
obligations.why: Ensure the `digits_after_decimal` option correctly handles multiple allowed digit counts.

obligations.rule: Cover the uncovered branch at line 21: if (options.negative_sign_after_digits) { pattern += negative; }
obligations.why: Test the `negative_sign_after_digits` option behavior.

obligations.rule: Cover the uncovered branch at line 44: if (options.parens_for_negatives) { pattern = `(\\(${pattern}\\)|${pattern})`; }
obligations.why: Test the `parens_for_negatives` option behavior.

obligations.rule: Cover the statement at line 24: `pattern = negative + pattern;`
obligations.why: This statement is uncovered and corresponds to the `negative_sign_before_digits` option.

obligations.rule: Cover the statement at line 30: `pattern = `( (?!\\-))?${pattern}`;`
obligations.why: This statement is uncovered and corresponds to the `allow_negative_sign_placeholder` option.

obligations.rule: Cover the statement at line 34: `pattern += '( (?!$))?';`
obligations.why: This statement is uncovered and corresponds to the `allow_space_after_digits` option.

obligations.rule: Cover the ternary true branch for `options.require_decimal` at line 16.
obligations.why: This branch is uncovered and corresponds to the `require_decimal` option being true.

obligations.rule: Cover the ternary false branch for `options.allow_decimal || options.require_decimal` at line 17.
obligations.why: This branch is uncovered and corresponds to both `allow_decimal` and `require_decimal` being false.

obligations.rule: Cover the binary expression path for `options.require_decimal` at line 17.
obligations.why: This path is uncovered and corresponds to `require_decimal` being true while `allow_decimal` is false.

test_groups.title: Default options profile
test_groups.rationale: Tests the default behavior when no options are provided.

test_groups.title: Custom symbol
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `symbol` option for custom currency symbols.

test_groups.title: Require symbol
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `require_symbol` option enforcing symbol presence.

test_groups.title: Allow space after symbol
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `allow_space_after_symbol` option.

test_groups.title: Symbol after digits
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `symbol_after_digits` option.

test_groups.title: Negative values allowed
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `allow_negatives` option.

test_groups.title: Thousands separator
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `thousands_separator` option.

test_groups.title: Decimal separator
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `decimal_separator` option.

test_groups.title: Digits after decimal
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `digits_after_decimal` option.

test_groups.title: Early return for non-string input
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `assertString` helper for type validation.

test_groups.title: Option merging behavior
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `merge` helper for combining options.

test_groups.title: Regex construction branches
test_groups.rationale: Tests regex construction for `allow_negatives` branch.

test_groups.title: Multiple digits after decimal
test_groups.rationale: Tests the handling of multiple allowed digit counts for `digits_after_decimal`.

test_groups.title: Negative sign after digits
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `negative_sign_after_digits` option behavior.

test_groups.title: Parentheses for negatives
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `parens_for_negatives` option behavior.

test_groups.title: Negative sign before digits
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `negative_sign_before_digits` option to cover the statement at line 24.

test_groups.title: Allow negative sign placeholder
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `allow_negative_sign_placeholder` option to cover the statement at line 30.

test_groups.title: Allow space after digits
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `allow_space_after_digits` option to cover the statement at line 34.

test_groups.title: Require decimal
test_groups.rationale: Tests the ternary true branch for `require_decimal` at line 16.

test_groups.title: Disallow decimal
test_groups.rationale: Tests the ternary false branch for `allow_decimal || require_decimal` at line 17.

test_groups.title: Require decimal without allowing decimal
test_groups.rationale: Tests the binary expression path for `require_decimal` at line 17.
